description_long: This is a tall, rectangular office building with a modern glass and steel facade, featuring a grid-like pattern of white vertical and horizontal mullions. The front side displays a prominent entrance with a small staircase and landscaped area with trees, while the rear is characterized by a uniform grid of blue-tinted windows. The building is divided into two main vertical sections connected by glass walkways, creating a striking architectural split. The windows are arranged in a highly regular, repetitive pattern, with alternating bands of blue and reddish panels. The structure sits on a circular base, surrounded by a landscaped plaza with scattered trees. The overall design is sleek and contemporary, emphasizing transparency and geometric order.
description: A tall, modern office building with a glass and steel grid facade, split into two vertical sections connected by glass walkways and surrounded by landscaped trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, landscaped plaza with trees, and the grid-patterned facade with alternating blue and reddish panels.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the split between the two vertical sections and the connecting glass walkways, as well as the landscaped area extending along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a uniform grid of blue-tinted windows with no visible entrance or landscaping details.
description_view_3: Angled view highlighting both the split structure with glass walkways and the landscaped entrance area.
attribute_window_pattern: Highly regular, grid-like arrangement of rectangular windows with consistent vertical and horizontal spacing across all facades.
